CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2002 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-20-02 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Beldon Yee.

Parties present Matthew Cohn attorney for plaintiff Omar Gamil; T.J. Murray attorney for defendant.

USA Insurance is to pay to plaintiff $15,000.00 on behalf of their insurers, defendants. Plaintiffs will dismiss the action with prejudice, and execute a standard release, plaintiff will execute a release of all liens. Each side to bear their own fees and costs.
